title: Actor Patrick Muldoon Passes Away at 57
summary: Patrick Muldoon, an American actor, has died at age 57. He was famous for playing roles in TV shows and movies. He acted in the soap opera Days of Our Lives and the sci-fi film Starship Troopers. His manager said he died at home from a heart attack. Friends and co-stars shared kind words about him, saying he was talented and nice. He also worked as a producer for films and had a band. He leaves behind family members who will miss him.
